An EF-0 tornado with 85 mph winds touched down just east of HWY-281 on County Road 151 around 11:05 AM CDT on August 22nd associated with Tropical Storm Harold. The tornado moved southwest along the county road, snapping large branches and splitting a few trees. The tornado lifted just west of HWY-281.
